name: (FII)-Financial Investment Intents
description: Two-level intent taxonomy for financial investment assistant. 14 top-level categories with 84 sub-intents. Supports bilingual EN/ES classification. Includes conversational meta-intents (greetings, small talk, out-of-scope, harmful content) and an explicit UNKNOWN fallback.

categories.name: ONBOARDING_KYC
categories.description: Utterances where the user's primary goal is to become a client or activate their ability to invest by opening an account, verifying identity, uploading documents, checking eligibility, or linking a bank account.

children.name: open_account
children.description: The user wants to initiate or continue the process of creating a new investment or brokerage account.

children.name: verify_identity
children.description: The user wants to understand or complete identity verification requirements (KYC) such as submitting a passport or national ID.

children.name: upload_document
children.description: The user wants to submit, resubmit, or check the handling of supporting documents such as proof of address, tax forms, or bank statements.

children.name: check_eligibility
children.description: The user wants to know whether they meet prerequisites to open an account or access a specific product.

children.name: age_limit
children.description: The user asks about age-related restrictions that affect their ability to open, operate, or manage an account.

children.name: link_bank_account
children.description: The user wants to connect, register, or verify an external bank account for the purpose of funding or receiving withdrawals.

categories.name: INVESTOR_PROFILING
categories.description: Utterances where the user's primary goal is to provide, update, or refuse personal and financial information that shapes their investor profile.

children.name: state_risk_tolerance
children.description: The user communicates or wants to adjust their willingness and capacity to accept investment risk.

children.name: state_investment_goal
children.description: The user describes or updates their high-level financial objectives such as capital growth, retirement, or income generation.

children.name: state_investment_horizon
children.description: The user specifies or updates the time frame over which they plan to hold investments before needing the money.

children.name: state_financial_situation
children.description: The user provides or updates information about their financial position, such as income, savings, or debts.

children.name: state_experience_level
children.description: The user describes or updates their prior knowledge, familiarity, and experience with financial products.

children.name: state_esg_preference
children.description: The user expresses or modifies preferences regarding Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) criteria.

children.name: update_risk_profile
children.description: The user explicitly wants to review or change their existing risk profile or investor classification.

children.name: refuse_to_answer_profiling
children.description: The user declines or partially refuses to provide required personal or financial information for profiling.

categories.name: PRODUCT_DISCOVERY
categories.description: Utterances where the user's primary goal is to explore, understand, compare, or filter the universe of available financial products.

children.name: explore_product_types
children.description: The user wants an overview of the different categories of financial products available (funds, ETFs, bonds, stocks).

children.name: compare_products
children.description: The user wants to compare two or more specific products on key attributes.

children.name: ask_product_features
children.description: The user asks about detailed characteristics of a specific product such as fees, minimum investment, or asset allocation.

children.name: ask_product_risk
children.description: The user asks about the risk level, volatility, or capital protection of a specific product.

children.name: ask_product_performance
children.description: The user asks about historical, recent, or scenario-based performance of a specific product.

children.name: ask_product_eligibility
children.description: The user asks whether they personally are allowed or able to invest in a specific product.

children.name: filter_by_criteria
children.description: The user wants to search, screen, or filter products based on explicit criteria like sector, geography, return, or fee level.

children.name: ask_esg_classification
children.description: The user asks about the ESG rating, classification, labels, or sustainability characteristics of a product.

categories.name: RECOMMENDATION_ADVISORY
categories.description: Utterances where the user's primary goal is to receive, understand, accept, reject, or adjust personalized investment recommendations.

children.name: request_recommendation
children.description: The user asks the assistant to suggest specific investments or product combinations based on their profile.

children.name: request_portfolio_suggestion
children.description: The user asks for a proposed portfolio structure or model portfolio.

children.name: ask_why_recommended
children.description: The user wants an explanation of the rationale behind a specific recommendation.

children.name: request_alternative
children.description: The user asks to see different options or variations to a current recommendation.

children.name: accept_recommendation
children.description: The user explicitly agrees with a recommendation or advisory proposal.

children.name: reject_recommendation
children.description: The user explicitly disagrees with or declines to follow a recommendation.

children.name: request_human_advisor
children.description: The user wants to escalate the advisory interaction to a human financial advisor.

children.name: request_rebalance_advice
children.description: The user asks for guidance on how to adjust or rebalance their existing portfolio.

categories.name: EXECUTION_TRANSACTIONS
categories.description: Utterances where the user's primary goal is to perform, modify, or check concrete money or securities transactions.

children.name: buy_investment
children.description: The user wants to place or modify an order to purchase a specific financial product.

children.name: sell_investment
children.description: The user wants to place or modify an order to sell all or part of an existing holding.

children.name: set_recurring_investment
children.description: The user wants to set up or adjust a periodic automatic investment plan.

children.name: cancel_order
children.description: The user wants to cancel or attempt to cancel a pending or scheduled investment order.

children.name: check_order_status
children.description: The user wants to know the current processing state of a previously submitted order.

children.name: transfer_funds
children.description: The user wants to move money between accounts.

children.name: withdraw_funds
children.description: The user wants to take money out of the investment environment to their bank account.

categories.name: PORTFOLIO_MONITORING
categories.description: Utterances where the user's primary goal is to observe, review, or document the state and evolution of their portfolio.

children.name: check_portfolio_value
children.description: The user wants to know the current overall value of their portfolio.

children.name: check_holdings
children.description: The user wants to see the individual positions or assets they currently hold.

children.name: check_performance
children.description: The user wants to review how their portfolio or specific holdings have performed over time.

children.name: check_gains_losses
children.description: The user wants to see realized or unrealized gains and losses.

children.name: set_alert
children.description: The user wants to configure or review alerts or notifications for price changes or thresholds.

children.name: request_statement
children.description: The user wants to obtain or download a formal account or portfolio statement.

children.name: ask_dividend_info
children.description: The user asks about dividend payments, schedules, yields, or reinvestment options.

categories.name: FINANCIAL_EDUCATION
categories.description: Utterances where the user's primary goal is to learn or understand general financial concepts, instruments, risk, strategies, market events, regulations, or tax implications.

children.name: explain_concept
children.description: The user asks for a plain-language explanation of a general financial or investment concept.

children.name: explain_instrument
children.description: The user wants to understand the characteristics and typical use cases of a specific financial instrument.

children.name: explain_risk
children.description: The user asks about how risk works in investing, including volatility, drawdown, or systematic risk.

children.name: explain_strategy
children.description: The user wants to learn about investment or portfolio strategies.

children.name: explain_market_event
children.description: The user asks about a particular market event, trend, or economic development.

children.name: explain_regulation
children.description: The user asks about financial regulations, investor protection frameworks, or supervisory bodies.

children.name: explain_tax_implications
children.description: The user asks about how taxation applies to investments, capital gains, or dividends.

categories.name: ACCOUNT_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT
categories.description: Utterances where the user's primary goal is to manage the ongoing service relationship or operational aspects of their account.

children.name: change_personal_details
children.description: The user wants to update personal data such as name, address, email, or phone number.

children.name: change_password
children.description: The user wants to reset, change, or recover their account password.

children.name: ask_about_fees
children.description: The user asks about fees and charges at the platform or service level.

children.name: file_complaint
children.description: The user wants to submit a formal complaint about the platform, service, or experience.

children.name: escalate_to_human
children.description: The user wants to be connected to a human support agent for operational issues.

children.name: terminate_account
children.description: The user wants to close, deactivate, or fully terminate their account.

children.name: ask_service_hours
children.description: The user asks about the platform's operational schedule or customer support availability.

children.name: ask_security
children.description: The user asks about security-related aspects of the platform such as authentication or data protection.

categories.name: REGULATORY_COMPLIANCE
categories.description: Utterances where the user's primary goal is to exercise or understand legal and regulatory rights or obligations.

children.name: request_risk_disclaimer
children.description: The user wants to see or receive formal risk warnings or disclaimers associated with investing.

children.name: request_data_access
children.description: The user wants to access, export, or receive a copy of their personal data (e.g., GDPR SAR).

children.name: request_data_deletion
children.description: The user wants their personal data to be deleted from the platform (right to be forgotten).

children.name: confirm_suitability
children.description: The user asks whether a product or recommendation is suitable given their profile and regulatory requirements.

children.name: ask_about_investor_protection
children.description: The user asks about investor protection mechanisms such as compensation funds or guarantees.

children.name: ask_about_conflicts_of_interest
children.description: The user asks about potential conflicts of interest the platform or advisor may have.

children.name: report_suspicious_activity
children.description: The user wants to report potentially fraudulent or suspicious activity on their account.

categories.name: GREETING
categories.description: Utterances whose primary function is to manage the conversational channel by starting, ending, or maintaining the interaction through social rituals.

children.name: opening
children.description: The user's main purpose is to initiate or re-initiate the interaction or session (e.g., 'Hello', 'Good morning').

children.name: closing
children.description: The user's main purpose is to end or conclude the current interaction or session (e.g., 'Goodbye', 'Thanks, bye').

children.name: phatic
children.description: The user's main purpose is to maintain or reinforce politeness and social connection (e.g., 'How are you?', 'Thank you').

categories.name: SMALL_TALK
categories.description: Utterances whose primary function is social, relational, or emotional, rather than to perform a financial task. Includes questions about the assistant itself, user feelings, and informal app feedback.

children.name: agent_identity
children.description: The user asks about or comments on what the assistant is, who made it, or what its capabilities are.

children.name: agent_personality
children.description: The user comments on or inquires about the assistant's perceived personality, tone, or style.

children.name: user_feelings
children.description: The user expresses emotions, attitudes, or psychological states about investing or the interaction.

children.name: chitchat
children.description: The user engages in light, non-task-oriented conversation that does not target financial outcomes.

children.name: app_feedback
children.description: The user shares informal, conversational feedback about the application or assistant experience.

categories.name: OUT_OF_SCOPE
categories.description: Utterances that request information or actions lying outside the financial investment assistant's supported domain, technical capabilities, or legal boundaries.

children.name: non_financial_topic
children.description: The user's main purpose is to obtain information or perform actions clearly outside the financial domain (e.g., weather, sports, recipes).

children.name: unsupported_financial_domain
children.description: The user's request is financial but concerns products, services, or markets not supported by this platform.

children.name: technical_capability_limit
children.description: The user asks for an outcome or functionality that exceeds the assistant's technical capabilities.

children.name: legal_or_policy_restricted
children.description: The user requests guidance or actions that would violate regulatory, legal, or company policy boundaries.

children.name: noise_unintelligible
children.description: The user input is so corrupted, incomplete, or ambiguous that no stable interpretation is possible.

categories.name: HARMFUL_UNETHICAL_COMMUNICATION
categories.description: Utterances whose primary function is to express abusive, hateful, or otherwise harmful content in language directed at individuals, groups, or the assistant.

children.name: harm_hate_lgbtiqphobia
children.description: The user conveys negative, hostile, or demeaning communication directed at LGBTIQ+ individuals or communities.

children.name: harm_hate_gender_based
children.description: The user conveys negative, hostile, or demeaning communication targeting individuals based on gender.

children.name: harm_hate_stereotypes_prejudice
children.description: The user promotes, endorses, or normalizes harmful stereotypes or prejudice based on race, ethnicity, religion, or other protected characteristics.

children.name: harm_toxic_insults_general
children.description: The user insults, demeans, or aggressively attacks a person or entity without targeting a specific protected group.

categories.name: UNKNOWN
categories.description: Fallback category for utterances where none of the defined categories and subcategories can be confidently assigned.

children.name: none
children.description: The classifier cannot confidently map the utterance to any existing category or subcategory.
